description: 把 learning_library prototype 從 app seed 遷移到 content-ko learning overlay，並建立 frontend 可用的 build artifact。

tasks.desc: Freeze source/sentence/knowledge/topic/vocab_set/links contracts based on the already-validated app prototype.
Define content-ko overlay directory layout under content/core/learning_library and content/i18n/zh_tw/learning_library.
Define the first migration pack mapping plan: video 79Pwq7MTUPE, dialogue A1-01, article A1-01 intro, A1-1 knowledge items, and time topic family.
Execute the actual content migration: move verified items into content-ko overlay directories.
Define artifact outputs and naming: learning_library_sources_index, learning_library_knowledge, learning_library_topics, learning_library_links, and optional learning_library_vocab_sets.
Implement normalization/build pipeline from content-ko overlay to app-facing learning library artifacts.
Add frontend artifact intake path in lingo-frontend-web while preserving temporary seed mode for comparison.
Run parity verification: confirm artifact mode matches prototype seed behavior for video/dialogue/article source detail flows.
Plan the handoff from content-first prototype to future knowledge-first lab once artifact mode is stable.
